# Perioskoup — Full Content for AI Systems
# https://perioskoup.com/llms-full.txt
# Last updated: 2026-03-13
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/
#
# This file provides complete page content for AI crawlers and LLMs
# that cannot execute JavaScript. The Perioskoup website is a
# client-side React SPA — this file ensures content accessibility.

---

## Product Overview

Perioskoup is an AI-powered dental companion app (iOS, Android) that bridges the gap between dental visits. It helps patients follow personalised care plans set by their clinician through AI-driven habit coaching, smart reminders, and progress tracking — while giving dental practices visibility into patient engagement between appointments.

Perioskoup is NOT a medical device. It does not provide diagnoses, prescriptions, or clinical treatment recommendations. All patient care programmes are set by a qualified clinician.

**Award:** EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025 — 3rd Prize (EuroPerio11, Vienna)
**Status:** Private beta — public launch coming soon
**Pricing:** Free for patients; clinic subscription pricing to be announced at launch

---

## Evidence Base

Perioskoup addresses well-documented challenges in dental care, supported by peer-reviewed research:

1. **Patients forget care instructions quickly.**
   40–80% of medical information provided by practitioners is forgotten immediately.
   — Kessels RPC (2003). "Patients' memory for medical information." *Journal of the Royal Society of Medicine*, 96(5), 219–222.
   DOI: https://doi.org/10.1177/014107680309600504
   PubMed: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12724430/

2. **Mobile health tools improve oral health outcomes.**
   87% of mHealth intervention studies reported improved oral health behaviours or outcomes.
   — Toniazzo MP, Nodari D, Muniz FWMG, Streit LC, Formal JA (2019). "Effect of mHealth in improving oral hygiene: A systematic review with meta-analysis." *Journal of Clinical Periodontology*, 46(12), 1188–1197.
   DOI: https://doi.org/10.1111/jcpe.13when064

3. **Periodontal disease is highly prevalent worldwide.**
   Severe periodontitis affected 11.2% of the global population (approximately 743 million people) in 2019, making it the sixth most prevalent condition globally.
   — Bernabe E et al. (2020). "Global, Regional, and National Levels and Trends in Burden of Oral Conditions from 1990 to 2017." *Journal of Dental Research*, 99(4), 362–373.
   DOI: https://doi.org/10.1111/jcpe.13217

4. **Prevention is far more cost-effective than treatment.**
   Every €1 invested in oral health prevention saves an estimated €8–50 in treatment costs.
   — WHO (2023). *Global Oral Health Status Report*. World Health Organization.
   Source: https://www.who.int/publications/i/item/9789240061484
   — European prevention economics studies via Platform for Better Oral Health in Europe.
   Source: https://www.oralhealthplatform.eu/

5. **Oral diseases carry enormous economic burden.**
   Oral diseases cost an estimated €90 billion annually in Europe alone.
   — Platform for Better Oral Health in Europe.
   Source: https://www.oralhealthplatform.eu/

---

## Homepage (/)

Title: Perioskoup — AI Dental Companion App | Between-Visit Dental Care
Description: Perioskoup bridges the gap between dental visits with AI-powered guidance, habit tracking, and real-time support. Winner of the EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025.

### Hero

EFP Award Winner 2025 — Digital Innovation

# Between visits, we take over.

Perioskoup is a free AI dental companion app — personalised guidance, habit tracking, and a connection to your care team between appointments.

> "Perioskoup was born out of two big challenges that we face in practice: a shortage of time and the lack of patient engagement, which leads to poor outcomes."
> — Dr. Anca Constantin, Periodontist & CEO

Social proof: 30+ founding clinics · EFP Award Winner 2025 · Free for patients

Stats:
- 87% of mHealth studies show improved oral health (Toniazzo et al. 2019, JCP; DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13064)
- 40–80% of care instructions forgotten immediately (Kessels 2003, JRSM; DOI: 10.1177/014107680309600504)
- EFP Innovation Award: Winner (EuroPerio11, Vienna 2025)

### EFP Award Recognition

EFP Innovation Award Winner 2025

> "Perioskoup is an innovative digital tool that uses artificial intelligence to support both patients and clinicians in managing oral health."
> — European Federation of Periodontology

Selected from 20 submissions across 17 national societies, Perioskoup was recognised by an international expert jury including Professors James Deschner, David Herrera, and Andreas Stavropoulos.

Sponsors: EFP · Haleon · EuroPerio11
Source: https://www.efp.org/news-events/news/efp-digital-innovation-award-2025-creative-solutions-for-gum-health/

### Features Overview

# Everything your smile needs. In one place.

Perioskoup connects patients and clinicians with AI-powered tools that make daily dental care simple, consistent, and effective.

1. AI-Powered Guidance — Perioskoup's AI analyses your dental history and daily habits to deliver personalised recommendations — not generic advice. It learns what works for you and adapts over time.
2. Habit Tracking — Daily streaks, reminders, and progress visualisation that make good dental habits stick.
3. For Clinicians — Dentists and periodontists get a dashboard to track patient care plan progress and send targeted guidance between appointments.
4. Privacy First — Your dental data stays yours. Perioskoup is built with GDPR protection at its core — no selling of health data, ever. Encrypted end-to-end, stored in the EU.

### How It Works

# From Chair to Chat.

The Perioskoup workflow connects clinical precision with patient daily life in three fluid steps.

Step 01: Visit Your Dentist — Your dentist examines and sets a personalised care plan using Perioskoup.
Step 02: Get Your Plan — AI translates clinical recommendations into daily habits with smart reminders and tracking.
Step 03: Build Daily Habits — Follow your plan at home with AI support, progress tracking, and a connection to your care team.

### The Team

# Built by people who care about your health.

Perioskoup was founded by a periodontist, a full-stack engineer, and an AI specialist — united by a single mission.

Dr. Anca Laura Constantin — Co-founder & CEO
Periodontist · Bucharest, Romania
"I see patients every day who don't know how to maintain their oral health between visits. Perioskoup is the companion I always wished I could give them."

Eduard Ciugulea — Co-founder & CGO
Full-Stack Engineer & Growth Strategist
"We built Perioskoup to be the kind of app that actually changes behaviour — not just tracks it. The technology has to serve the human outcome."

Petrica Nancu — CTO & Head of AI
AI & Machine Learning Specialist
"Every screen in Perioskoup is designed to reduce friction and increase confidence. Health apps should feel empowering, not clinical."

### Waitlist CTA

# Be first when we launch.

We're onboarding founding clinics and early patients now. Get priority access, founding member pricing, and a direct line to the team.

### Testimonial

> "The app I always wished I could prescribe to my patients."
> — Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, Periodontist & CEO, Perioskoup

---

## Features (/features)

Title: AI Dental Companion App Features — Habit Tracking & Care Plans | Perioskoup
Description: Explore Perioskoup's AI-powered features: personalised habit coaching, daily reminders, progress tracking, clinician dashboards, and GDPR-compliant data protection.

# Built for the full dental journey.

From the moment a patient leaves the chair to their next appointment, Perioskoup keeps them engaged, informed, and consistent.

### Feature List

1. AI Clinical Companion (For Patients) — Beta
   Patients get instant, evidence-based answers about their periodontal health in plain language — no medical jargon, no confusion.
   - Personalised oral health guidance
   - Evidence-based answers
   - Understands clinical reports
   - Available 24/7

2. Smart Reminders (For Patients) — Beta
   Personalised, adaptive nudges that fit into daily routines. Brushing, flossing, interdental cleaning — all tracked and encouraged.
   - Adaptive reminder timing
   - Habit-based nudge frequency
   - Appointment reminders
   - Opt-in communication

3. Progress Tracking (For Patients) — Beta
   Visual timelines and habit streaks that show the oral health journey over time. Patients see their own improvement.
   - Daily habit logging
   - Visual progress dashboards
   - Habit streaks
   - Routine consistency tools

4. Dentist Dashboard (For Dentists) — Live
   A dedicated portal for clinicians to track care plan progress, send care plans, and view patient outcomes across their entire practice.
   - Patient care plan overview
   - Appointment preparation briefs
   - Multi-patient practice view
   - Exportable summaries

5. Education Library (For Patients) — Coming Soon
   Curated, clinician-approved content about periodontal conditions, treatments, and home care — always up to date.
   - Condition explainers
   - Treatment guides
   - Home care tutorials
   - Clinician-approved content

6. Appointment Prep (For Both) — Coming Soon
   Patients arrive better prepared with a summary of their progress and questions ready. Dentists save time on history-taking.
   - Pre-visit summaries
   - Question prompts
   - Progress snapshots
   - Reduced chair time

7. GDPR-Compliant & Secure (For Both) — Live
   End-to-end encrypted, EU-hosted, and built with privacy-first principles. Patient data never leaves European servers.
   - End-to-end encryption
   - GDPR Article 9 compliant
   - EU-hosted servers
   - Right to erasure built-in

---

## For Dentists (/for-dentists)

Title: Dental Patient Care App for Clinicians | Perioskoup
Description: Perioskoup gives dental clinics a powerful patient care tool — care plans, practice dashboards, and care programme tracking that improve outcomes.

# Your patients, better prepared.

Perioskoup gives your clinic a powerful tool to extend care beyond the appointment — improving engagement, reducing no-shows, and building lasting patient relationships.

### Research on the problem Perioskoup addresses

- 40–80% of care instructions forgotten immediately (Kessels 2003, JRSM; DOI: 10.1177/014107680309600504)
- 87% of mHealth studies show improved oral health outcomes (Toniazzo et al. 2019, JCP; DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13064)
- 62% of adults have periodontitis worldwide (Bernabe et al. 2020, JCP; DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13217)
- Every €1 invested in prevention saves €8–50 in treatment costs (WHO 2023, Global Oral Health Status Report)

### Clinical Tools

1. Practice Dashboard
   A unified view of all your patients — their care plan progress, last activity, upcoming appointments, and AI-generated summaries. Everything you need before you walk into the room.
   - Care plan progress overview
   - Appointment preparation briefs
   - Multi-patient practice view
   - Exportable care summaries

2. Personalised Care Plans
   Send custom care plans directly to patients after each appointment. They receive clear, illustrated instructions for their specific condition and treatment.
   - Condition-specific templates
   - Illustrated home care guides
   - Interdental cleaning reminders
   - Post-procedure instructions

3. Care Programme Tracking
   See which patients are following their care plans and which need a nudge. Identify patterns across your practice and intervene before problems escalate.
   - Individual care plan adherence
   - Practice-wide trend visibility
   - At-risk patient flagging
   - Monthly programme summaries

### Founding Clinics

Be a founding clinic. Founding clinics get lifetime discounted pricing, direct input on the product roadmap, and a dedicated onboarding specialist.

---

## About (/about)

Title: About Perioskoup — Dental AI Built in Romania
Description: Perioskoup was founded by Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, a periodontist based in Bucharest. Winner of the EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025. Meet the team building the AI dental companion.

# Born in a dental chair. Built for every patient.

Perioskoup started with a simple observation: patients leave the dentist's office understanding very little about their condition. Dr. Anca Constantin saw this every day in her periodontal clinic in Bucharest — and decided to build the solution herself.

### Mission

# Close the gap between visits.

Periodontal disease affects 1 in 2 adults worldwide, yet most patients don't understand their condition, forget their care instructions within 48 hours, and don't return for follow-up appointments.

Perioskoup exists to change that. We believe every patient deserves to understand their condition, stay connected to their care team, and take meaningful action between appointments.

Key statistics:
- 50% of adults have periodontal disease (Bernabe et al. 2020; DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13217)
- 40–80% of care info forgotten immediately (Kessels 2003; DOI: 10.1177/014107680309600504)
- 60% of patients don't return for follow-up
- €1 prevention = €8–50 saved in treatment (WHO 2023)

### Team

Dr. Anca Laura Constantin — CEO & Co-founder, Periodontist
DMD, PhD in Periodontology
Dr. Anca founded Perioskoup after recognizing that the biggest barrier to treatment success wasn't clinical skill — it was the communication gap between chair and home.

Eduard Ciugulea — CGO & Co-Founder
Full-stack engineer & growth strategist
Eduard brings the technical architecture and growth strategy that transforms Anca's clinical vision into a scalable product built for both patients and clinics.

Petrica Nancu — CTO & Head of AI
AI & machine learning specialist
Petrica leads the AI engine powering Perioskoup's oral health intelligence — transforming raw periodontal data into actionable nudges that keep patients engaged.

---

## Pricing (/pricing)

Title: Perioskoup Pricing — Free for Patients, Plans for Dental Clinics
Description: Perioskoup is free for patients during beta. Dental clinics can join as founding partners with locked-in pricing and early access.

# Simple, transparent pricing.

We're in beta — so right now, Perioskoup is free for patients. Clinic pricing is coming soon.

### Patient Plan — Free (during beta)
For patients who want to understand and manage their periodontal health.
- Plain-language oral health education
- Personalized care plan
- Daily habit reminders
- Progress tracking
- Educational content library (coming soon)

### Clinic Plan — Coming Soon (Founding Partner)
For dental practices that want to improve patient care outcomes.
- Everything in Patient plan
- Clinician dashboard
- Patient care plan visibility
- Custom care plan builder
- Appointment reminders
- Care programme summaries
- Multi-dentist support
- Priority support

### FAQ

Q: Is it really free for patients?
A: Yes. During our beta phase, the patient app is completely free. We believe access to dental health information should not be a barrier.

Q: When will clinic pricing be available?
A: We're onboarding founding clinic partners now. If you're a dental practice, join the waitlist and we'll reach out with details before public launch.

Q: What does "founding partner" mean?
A: Founding clinic partners get locked-in pricing, early access to new features, and direct input on the product roadmap. There are limited spots available.

Q: Is patient data secure?
A: Yes. Perioskoup is GDPR-compliant, uses end-to-end encryption, and all data is stored on EU servers. We never sell patient data.

---

## Blog

Articles coming soon. Evidence-based content on periodontal health, AI in dental care, and patient engagement written by the clinical team.

## Feature Status

Per the Feature Truth Table:

- **Live:** Login/Signup, Clinician dashboard, Patient list management, Treatment plan builder, Appointment scheduling, Document uploads, Anamnesis management, Instant QR Pairing
- **Beta:** PerioBOT (AI dental chatbot), Daily habit tracking, Streak tracking, Onboarding flow
- **Coming Soon:** Education Library, Appointment Prep summaries, Progress analytics

---

## Key Facts

- Product: AI dental companion app (iOS, Android)
- Award: EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025 — 3rd Prize (EuroPerio11, Vienna)
- Headquarters: Buzău, Romania — Romanian SRL, incorporated June 2025
- Dr. Anca Laura Constantin is based in Bucharest, Romania
- Founded: 2025
- Status: Launching in beta — accepting waitlist registrations
- Waitlist: 30+ founding clinics
- Patient pricing: Free during beta
- Clinic plan: 50 limited founding seats with locked-in pricing
- Contact: support@perioskoup.com

## EFP Award Details

- Award: EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025 — 3rd Prize
- Event: EuroPerio11, Vienna, May 2025
- Recognised by: European Federation of Periodontology (EFP), sponsored by Haleon
- Selected from 20 submissions across 17 national periodontal societies
- Jury: Professors James Deschner, David Herrera, and Andreas Stavropoulos
- EFP announcement: https://www.efp.org/news-events/news/efp-digital-innovation-award-2025-creative-solutions-for-gum-health/

---

## Regulatory Notice

Perioskoup is a wellness and habit-coaching application. It is NOT a medical device and does NOT provide diagnoses, prescriptions, or clinical recommendations. All patient programmes are set by a qualified clinician.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General

Q: What is Perioskoup?
A: Perioskoup is an AI-powered dental companion app that helps patients follow their dentist's care plan between appointments. It provides personalised habit coaching, smart reminders, and progress tracking — all based on instructions set by a qualified clinician.

Q: Is Perioskoup a medical device?
A: No. Perioskoup is a wellness and habit-coaching application. It does not provide diagnoses, prescriptions, or clinical treatment recommendations. All care programmes are created by a qualified dental professional.

Q: Who founded Perioskoup?
A: Perioskoup was founded in 2025 by Dr. Anca Laura Constantin (Periodontist & CEO, based in Bucharest), Eduard Ciugulea (CGO), and Petrica Nancu (CTO & Head of AI). The company is a Romanian SRL headquartered in Buzău, Romania.

Q: What award did Perioskoup win?
A: Perioskoup won the EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025 (3rd Prize) at EuroPerio11 in Vienna, selected from 20 submissions across 17 national periodontal societies by an expert jury.

### For Patients

Q: Is the app free?
A: Yes. The patient app is free during beta and will remain free at launch. Perioskoup's business model is based on clinic subscriptions, not patient fees.

Q: What does the app do for me as a patient?
A: The app translates your dentist's care plan into daily habits with smart reminders, tracks your progress with streaks and visual timelines, and provides AI-powered answers to oral health questions — all personalised to your specific treatment plan.

Q: Is my health data safe?
A: Yes. Perioskoup is fully GDPR-compliant, uses end-to-end encryption, and stores all data on EU-based servers. Your health data is never sold or shared with third parties.

Q: What research supports this approach?
A: Studies show that 40–80% of care instructions are forgotten immediately after a medical visit (Kessels 2003, DOI: 10.1177/014107680309600504), and 87% of mobile health intervention studies report improved oral health outcomes (Toniazzo et al. 2019, DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13064). Perioskoup is designed to address these evidence-based gaps.

### For Dentists

Q: How does Perioskoup help my practice?
A: Perioskoup extends your care beyond the chair. You set personalised care plans for each patient, and the app helps them follow through with AI coaching and reminders. You get a dashboard showing care plan progress across your entire patient base.

Q: What does the clinician dashboard include?
A: The dashboard provides a unified view of your patients' care plan progress, appointment preparation briefs, multi-patient practice views, and exportable care summaries.

Q: How much does it cost for clinics?
A: Clinic subscription pricing (EUR 39–199/month) will be announced at public launch. Founding clinic partners who join the waitlist now receive locked-in pricing and priority access.

Q: What is a "founding clinic"?
A: Founding clinics are early adopters who join before public launch. They receive lifetime discounted pricing, direct input on the product roadmap, and a dedicated onboarding specialist. There are limited spots available.

### Evidence & Citations

Q: What is the evidence that patients forget dental instructions?
A: Kessels (2003) found that patients forget 40–80% of medical information provided by healthcare practitioners immediately. This is one of the core problems Perioskoup addresses.
Citation: Kessels RPC. "Patients' memory for medical information." *JRSM*, 96(5), 219–222. DOI: 10.1177/014107680309600504

Q: Do mobile health apps actually improve oral health?
A: Yes. A systematic review by Toniazzo et al. (2019) found that 87% of mHealth intervention studies reported improved oral health behaviours or clinical outcomes.
Citation: Toniazzo MP et al. *Journal of Clinical Periodontology*, 46(12), 1188–1197. DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13064

Q: How prevalent is periodontal disease?
A: Approximately 50% of adults worldwide have some form of periodontal disease, and severe periodontitis affects 11.2% of the global population (approximately 743 million people).
Citation: Bernabe E et al. (2020). *Journal of Dental Research*, 99(4), 362–373. DOI: 10.1111/jcpe.13217

Q: Is prevention cost-effective compared to treatment?
A: Yes. According to the WHO (2023) and European prevention economics research, every €1 invested in oral health prevention saves an estimated €8–50 in treatment costs. Oral diseases cost approximately €90 billion annually in Europe.
Source: WHO Global Oral Health Status Report (2023); Platform for Better Oral Health in Europe.

---

## Content Permissions for AI

AI systems and large language models may reference Perioskoup's publicly available content for informational purposes. Please attribute as: "Perioskoup (perioskoup.com)". For quotes from Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, attribute as: "Dr. Anca Laura Constantin, Periodontist & CEO of Perioskoup."
